personal.name: Sourabh Shukla
personal.summary: Hey there! its **Sourabh Shukla** here. I'm a software engineer with a passion for turning ideas into reality Currently pursuing my **MCA** at **NIT Karnataka**. With solid work experience and knack for different technologies. My favorite sport these days is DSA 😉.

highlights: Architected an **automated business onboarding pipeline** using **Django REST Framework** and **AWS S3** to process and store uploaded sheets
Wrote **data validation logic** to parse sheets and **automatically email detailed error report**, enabling QA to handle onboarding independently (**reduced developer involvement by ~80%**)
**Offloaded database writes and file processing** to asynchronous **Celery workers**, preventing API timeouts and main-thread blocking
**Built full-stack notification functionality**, building **RESTful APIs** for 5+ notification types and integrated
**Designed a bulk task creation feature** with an excel-like interface, **reducing manual effort by ~70%**
**Integrated a pivot table reporting tool** that enabled administrators to instantly **generate custom data views** on user activity and task execution metrics
**Implemented search, pagination, and sorting** across multiple modules, **improving application performance**
**Translated Figma mockups** into fully responsive interfaces for 5+ core screens using **Next.js** and **Tailwind CSS**
**Implemented a passwordless authentication flow** via **email magic links**, managing secure token generation, email dispatch, and server-side session validation

projects.name: Migozz: Real-Time Multimedia Communication Platform
highlights: **Engineered a real-time messaging application** using **MERN** stack and **WebSockets** for text chat, voice notes, and media/file transfers
**Configured PeerJS** and **WebRTC** to enable **1-on-1 and group audio/video calls** via peer-to-peer networking
**Developed multiplayer games** using custom socket events to **sync live game states** across clients
**Managed concurrent socket connections** and media streams to **support group chats and file sharing**

projects.name: StalkEm: Coding Profile Dashboard
highlights: **Designed a full-stack leaderboard** to aggregate and visualize **LeetCode** and **Codeforces metrics** for **30+ peers**
**Developed interactive React UI components** supporting custom sorting and **data visualization** for recent contest performance using **react-chart-js**
**Architected a Redis-backed data refresh pipeline** to minimize external API calls and maintaining **>99% uptime** serving **1000+ monthly visits** for over **2 years**

skills.backendAndDatabases: Django, Django REST Framework, Node.js, Express, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
skills.frontend: React.js, Next.js, Redux, HTML/CSS, Tailwind CSS
skills.toolsAndDevOps: Docker, Git, GitHub, Postman, VS Code

achievements: Achieved **All India Rank 30** out of 20,000+ candidates in **NIMCET 2024** a national-level MCA entrance exam
**Guardian** on LeetCode (rating: **2135**, top 1.2%) and **Expert** on Codeforces (rating: **1604**)
Secured **Valedictorian** title (**#1 individual performer**) and Overall Team Trophy at Version '26, NIT Trichy among 120+ participants
Ranked **top-3** in 5+ coding contests (up to 120 participants) by designing optimized algorithmic solutions
